scripts.package:release: rm -rf release && mkdir -p release/kiel-univis-courses && cp index.mjs lib.mjs assigned-resolution.mjs athena-map.mjs entities.mjs manifest.json time.mjs univis-normalize.mjs univis-parse.mjs release/kiel-univis-courses/ && cd release && zip -rq kiel-univis-courses.zip kiel-univis-courses
